title: Sergeant Service Catalog (auto-derived)
description: Machine-readable mirror of `docs/02-engineering/architecture/service-catalog.md` — production surfaces enumerated from Dockerfiles + railway.*.toml + workspace folders. Generated by scripts/docs/generate-service-catalog.mjs. Acts as drift-detector: the markdown view stays hand-maintained (editorial runbook / rollback / data-sensitivity columns) but every surface here MUST appear in the markdown.

id.description: Stable slug used as the node id when this catalog is folded into knowledge-graph.json.

workspace.description: Workspace path (relative to repo root) when the surface is hosted by a single workspace; null for cross-cutting surfaces like n8n workflows.

deployArtifact.description: Dockerfile, vercel project name, or railway.toml path that defines the deploy.

railwayService.description: Railway service name when deployTarget=railway; extracted from comments in railway.*.toml.

healthcheckPath.description: HTTP path for liveness, when applicable.

owner.description: First CODEOWNERS handle that matches the workspace path.
